'''Vennido T'all''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musician who lived on [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]]. His music was notable for its strong anti-[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] sentiment, and in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], he composed a song that contained samples from the [[Jabiimi]] separatist commander [[Alto Stratus]]' speeches to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
